lines.english: Where was the Statue of Liberty made?
lines.chinese: 自由女神像是在哪里制造的？
lines.raw: Where was the Statue of Liberty made? | 自由女神像是在哪里制造的？

lines.english: One of the most famous monuments in the world, the Statue of Liberty,
lines.chinese: 世界上最著名的纪念碑之一，自由女神像，
lines.raw: One of the most famous monuments in the world, the Statue of Liberty, | 世界上最著名的纪念碑之一，自由女神像，

lines.english: was presented to the USA in the nineteenth century by the people of France.
lines.chinese: 在十九世纪由法国人民赠送给美国。
lines.raw: was presented to the USA in the nineteenth century by the people of France. | 在十九世纪由法国人民赠送给美国。

lines.english: The great statue, which was designed by the sculptor Auguste Bartholdi, took ten years to complete.
lines.chinese: 这座由雕塑家奥古斯特·巴托尔迪设计的宏伟雕像，花了十年才完成。
lines.raw: The great statue, which was designed by the sculptor Auguste Bartholdi, took ten years to complete. | 这座由雕塑家奥古斯特·巴托尔迪设计的宏伟雕像，花了十年才完成。

lines.english: The actual figure was made of copper supported by a metal framework which had been especially constructed by Eiffel.
lines.chinese: 实际雕像由铜制成，由埃菲尔专门建造的金属框架支撑。
lines.raw: The actual figure was made of copper supported by a metal framework which had been especially constructed by Eiffel. | 实际雕像由铜制成，由埃菲尔专门建造的金属框架支撑。

lines.english: Before it could be transported to the United States,
lines.raw: Before it could be transported to the United States, | 在它被运往美国之前，

lines.english: a site had to be found for it and a pedestal had to be built.
lines.chinese: 必须为它找到一个地点并建造一个基座。
lines.raw: a site had to be found for it and a pedestal had to be built. | 必须为它找到一个地点并建造一个基座。

lines.english: The site chosen was an island at the entrance of New York Harbour.
lines.chinese: 所选地点是纽约港入口处的一个岛屿。
lines.raw: The site chosen was an island at the entrance of New York Harbour. | 所选地点是纽约港入口处的一个岛屿。

lines.english: By 1884, a statue which was 151 feet tall had been erected in Paris.
lines.chinese: 到1884年，一座151英尺高的雕像已在巴黎建成。
lines.raw: By 1884, a statue which was 151 feet tall had been erected in Paris. | 到1884年，一座151英尺高的雕像已在巴黎建成。

lines.english: The following year, it was taken to pieces and sent to America.
lines.chinese: 次年，它被拆解并运往美国。
lines.raw: The following year, it was taken to pieces and sent to America. | 次年，它被拆解并运往美国。
By the end of October 1886, | 到1886年10月底，

lines.english: the statue had been put together again and it was officially presented to the American people by Bartholdi.
lines.chinese: 雕像已被重新组装，并由巴托尔迪正式赠送给美国人民。
lines.raw: the statue had been put together again and it was officially presented to the American people by Bartholdi. | 雕像已被重新组装，并由巴托尔迪正式赠送给美国人民。

lines.english: Ever since then, the great monument has been a symbol of liberty
lines.chinese: 从那时起，这座伟大的纪念碑一直是自由的象征，
lines.raw: Ever since then, the great monument has been a symbol of liberty | 从那时起，这座伟大的纪念碑一直是自由的象征，

lines.english: for the millions of people who have passed through New York Harbour to make their homes in America.
lines.chinese: 对数百万穿过纽约港来美国安家的人们来说。
lines.raw: for the millions of people who have passed through New York Harbour to make their homes in America. | 对数百万穿过纽约港来美国安家的人们来说。
